title: Savory Aubergine Frittata with Silkiness
description: A simple Venezuelan-inspired breakfast frittata with aubergine and silky texture. Perfect for a weekend brunch.
instructions: Brush the aubergine slices with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Sauté the aubergine slices in a pan until softened.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and set aside.
In the same pan, add the eggs and cook until the edges start to set.
Add the sautéed aubergine to the eggs and gently fold.
Transfer the frittata to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
